hero.title: Expense Tracker
hero.description: Record everyday spending, organize transactions, and understand where your money goes.

differences.title: Calm spending awareness
differences.description: A focused tracker for useful daily visibility without accounting complexity.

items.description: Record spending while the details are still fresh.

items.description: Review spending patterns without noisy dashboards.

feel.title: Simple enough for every day

items.title: Capture quickly
items.description: Add the amount and essential context in a short flow.

items.title: Review confidently

audiences.description: Useful for anyone who wants a clearer view of personal spending.
